data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances user satisfaction through a visually pleasing interface.
data.technical_spec: User interfaces are streamlined, with consistent color schemes and intuitive navigation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design considerations that make interactive elements easy to select.
data.technical_spec: Interactive buttons are appropriately sized and spaced for efficiency.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Reduces decision time by limiting choices per screen.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menu structures to quickly guide users to their desired destination.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design familiar environments that align with user expectations from related applications.
data.technical_spec: Interface consistency aligns with common streaming apps to leverage familiarity.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits information load on each page to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Content is organized to present up to seven items per screen.
